memoryArtifacts.headline: Colonial families of Long Island, New York and Connecticut : being the ancestry & kindred of Herbert Furman Seversmith
memoryArtifacts.description: Provides information on Sarah Losea or Losee, her husband John Brass, in-laws Pieter Hendrickszen Bras(s) and Catharina Jans and her parents.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Pieter Hendrickszen Brass於1640年9月7日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼劍橋大學默里 約克 庫迪紐約市時，他的父親Henderick Pieterszen Brass25歲，母親Geertjen Everts23歲。他於1678年與Catharina Jans Bloemendael在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼金斯福拉特布申結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1718年2月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼昆斯牙買加享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pieter Hendrickszen Brass于1640年9月7日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼劍橋大學默里 約克 庫迪紐約市时，他的父亲Henderick Pieterszen Brass25岁，母亲Geertjen Everts23岁。他于1678年与Catharina Jans Bloemendael在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼金斯福拉特布申结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1718年2月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼昆斯牙買加享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brass
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Birse in Aberdeenshire, metathesized to Brass.
North German: nickname from Middle Low German brās ‘noise, pomp’, a related form of brāsch (see Braasch ).

variants.name: Brace
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French braz, brace, brase ‘arm’, probably used of someone with a strong arm or with a deformity of the arm.

nameMeanings.name: Pieter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Hendrickszen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Alf, Erik.  German Bernhard, Erwin.
Dutch and German (located in the border area of Nijmegen and Kleve): variant of   Hendriksen  .
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish   Henriksen  . Compare   Hendrickson  .

variants.name: Hendriksen
meanings: Dutch, North German, and Danish: patronymic from the personal name Hendrik (see Henry 1). Compare Hendricksen and Hendrickson .

historicEvents.description: After the English took over in the 1660s, the colony was renamed New York, after the Duke of York
Historical Boundaries 1683: New York County, New York Colony, British Colonial America 1776: New York, New York, United States
Historical Boundaries 1683: Queens, New York Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Queens, New York, United States 1898: Borough of Queens, New York, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Pieter Hendrickszen Brass was born on 7 September 1640, in New York City, New York County, New York Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Henderick Pieterszen Brass, was 25 and his mother, Geertjen Everts, was 23. He married Catharina Jans Bloemendael in 1678, in Flatbush, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 8 February 1718, in Jamaica, Queens, New York Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pieter Hendrickszen Brass est né le 7 septembre 1640, à New York City, New York County, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Henderick Pieterszen Brass, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Geertjen Everts, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Catharina Jans Bloemendael en 1678, à Flatbush, Kings, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 8 février 1718, à Jamaica, Queens, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pieter Hendrickszen Brass am 7. September 1640 in New York City, New York County, New York Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henderick Pieterszen Brass 25 und seine Mutter Geertjen Everts 23. Er hat 1678 in Flatbush, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America Catharina Jans Bloemendael geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Februar 1718 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Jamaica, Queens, New York Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pieter Hendrickszen Brass è nato il il 7 settembre 1640 nel New York City, New York County, New York Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Henderick Pieterszen Brass, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Geertjen Everts, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Catharina Jans Bloemendael nel 1678, nel Flatbush, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 8 febbraio 1718, nel Jamaica, Queens, New York Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Pieter Hendrickszen Brassが1640年9月7日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニーニュー ヨーク コウントイニュー ヨーク シトイで生まれた時，父Henderick Pieterszen Brassは25歳，母Geertjen Evertsは23歳であった。1678年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニーキングズフラトブッシュでCatharina Jans Bloemendaelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1718年2月8日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニークイーンスジャメイカで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Pieter Hendrickszen Brass(이)가 1640년 9월 7일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 뉴 요르크 카운티 뉴 요르크 시티에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henderick Pieterszen Brass(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Geertjen Everts(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1678년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 킨그스 플라트부시에서 Catharina Jans Bloemendael(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1718년 2월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 퀸스 자메이카에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pieter Hendrickszen Brass родился 7 сентября 1640 г. в местности ню ерк сити, ню ерк коунти, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Henderick Pieterszen Brass было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Geertjen Everts, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Catharina Jans Bloemendael в 1678 г. в местности флатбуш, кингс, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 8 февраля 1718 г. в местности джамеика, куинс, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 77 лет.
